features.description: User can view list of orders
acceptance_criteria: OrdersPage displays order list from API
Empty state shown when no orders
features.notes: Implemented in boilerplate. See OrdersPage.tsx + useOrders hook

features.description: User can create a new order via form
acceptance_criteria: Ant Design form fields for items
Cancel button visible on pending orders
Order status updates in UI after cancel

features.description: Storybook stories for core UI components
features.notes: Completed 2026-06-04 — BaseButton.stories.tsx (18 stories), BaseInput.stories.tsx (17 stories), SearchField.stories.tsx (12 stories), OrderList.stories.tsx (9 stories), OrderForm.stories.tsx (10 stories) = 66 total stories

acceptance_criteria: Storybook tests run in CI pipeline

features.description: Playwright E2E tests for critical paths
features.notes: E2E tests exist in e2e/ directory
